slides.title: A grateful mind, *a healthier life*.
slides.sub: A simple gratitude habit supports mood and may help you age well. The mind is part of healthspan too.

slides.title: The mind shapes healthspan
slides.body: Aging well is not only physical. A steady, hopeful outlook *may support* the body in quiet ways.

slides.title: What gratitude shifts
slides.body: Noticing the good can soften stress and lift your outlook. Over time that *may support* calmer, healthier days.

slides.title: A tiny daily habit
slides.body: Name three things you are grateful for each morning or night. The practice *takes a minute*.

slides.title: Small and steady wins
slides.body: A short habit you repeat beats a long one you abandon. Consistency *is what* makes it stick.

slides.title: Tend to your outlook
slides.body: Treat your mind as part of your health. A daily moment of gratitude *may help* you age well.

slides.title: Care for *mind and body*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the sleep, food and movement that help you age well, all in one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your mind is part of your healthspan, not separate from it. 🌿

A tiny gratitude habit can soften stress and lift your outlook, and small, steady practice is what makes it stick. Try three things a day. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How a Daily Gratitude Habit Supports Mood and Healthy Aging
